## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest -m "not slow"`).
- [ ] New or changed behavior is covered by tests.
- [ ] Affected gallery demos rerun cleanly (see `GALLERY_STYLE_GUIDE.md`).
- [ ] Public-API changes are reflected in `AGENTS.md` and the API map
      (`python scripts/gen_api_map.py`).
- [ ] Docstrings follow the NumPy style used across the codebase.
- [ ] Docs build without new warnings if docs were touched
      (`cd docs && make html`).
